strengths: 19 years of progressive full-stack development with 6+ years in senior roles; current position at re:cinq demonstrates expertise in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js) plus AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks.
Proven track record building production systems at scale—Optilyz handled millions of annual transactions; demonstrates strong fundamentals in architecture, performance, and reliability.
Deep commitment to code quality evidenced by TDD discipline, creation of testing frameworks and workshops, and consistent mentorship activities across multiple organizations.
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary stack requirement; background shows Node.js but not the specific framework.

Resume header name (Aisha Okonkwo) does not match any professional profiles or contact information—all professional links reference Bogdan Szabo. This identity discrepancy requires immediate clarification.
Limited evidence of relational database expertise in production environments; MongoDB mentioned at Optilyz but PostgreSQL and MySQL proficiency not demonstrated in relevant roles.

key_factors.factor: Full-stack depth & modern tech stack alignment
Framework and tool-specific gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL)

response.justification: This candidate brings exceptional full-stack engineering breadth with 19 years of experience and strong alignment with the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js). Recent work on AI agent infrastructure at re:cinq directly matches emerging job requirements. However, the resume presents a critical blocker: the stated name does not match any professional profiles or contact information, all of which reference a different identity. This must be resolved before proceeding. Beyond this concern, the candidate shows strong fundamentals in testing discipline and architecture, though lacks explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and PostgreSQL expertise that would require ramp-up.
